functions.name: UnRetainAllSoundsInSoundClass
functions.description: Iterate through all sound waves and releases handles to retained chunks. (If the chunk is not being played it will be up for eviction)

functions.name: UnloadStreamLevelBySoftObjectPtr
functions.description: Unload a streamed in level (by Object Reference)

functions.name: UnloadStreamLevel
functions.description: Unload a streamed in level (by Name)

functions.name: TransformWorldToFirstPerson
functions.description: Transforms a world space location into "first person space". This function mirrors the morphing that is applied to first person primitives

functions.name: SuggestProjectileVelocity_MovingTarget
functions.description: Returns a launch velocity need for a projectile to hit the TargetActor in TimeToTarget seconds based on the TargetActor's current velocity.

functions.name: SuggestProjectileVelocity_CustomArc
functions.description: Returns the launch velocity needed for a projectile at rest at StartPos to land on EndPos.

functions.name: SpawnSoundAttached
functions.description: This function allows users to create and play Audio Components attached to a specific Scene Component.

functions.name: SpawnSoundAtLocation
functions.description: Spawns a sound at the given location. This does not travel with any actor. Replication is also not handled at this point.

functions.name: SpawnSound2D
functions.description: This function allows users to create Audio Components with settings specifically for non-spatialized,

functions.name: SpawnObject
functions.description: --- Create Object

functions.name: SpawnForceFeedbackAttached
functions.description: Plays a force feedback effect attached to and following the specified component. This is a fire and forget effect. Replication is also not handled at this point.

functions.name: SpawnForceFeedbackAtLocation
functions.description: Plays a force feedback effect at the given location. This is a fire and forget effect and does not travel with any actor. Replication is also not handled at this point.

functions.name: SpawnEmitterAttached
functions.description: Plays the specified effect attached to and following the specified component. The system will go away when the effect is complete. Does not replicate.

functions.name: SpawnEmitterAtLocation
functions.description: Plays the specified effect at the given location and rotation, fire and forget. The system will go away when the effect is complete. Does not replicate.

functions.name: SpawnDialogueAttached
functions.description: Spawns a DialogueWave, a special type of Asset that requires Context data in order to resolve a specific SoundBase,

functions.name: SpawnDialogueAtLocation
functions.description: Spawns a DialogueWave, a special type of Asset that requires Context data in order to resolve a specific SoundBase,

functions.name: SpawnDialogue2D
functions.description: Spawns a DialogueWave, a special type of Asset that requires Context data in order to resolve a specific SoundBase,

functions.name: SpawnDecalAttached
functions.description: Spawns a decal attached to and following the specified component. Does not replicate.

functions.name: SpawnDecalAtLocation
functions.description: Spawns a decal at the given location and rotation, fire and forget. Does not replicate.

functions.name: SetWorldOriginLocation
functions.description: Requests a new location for a world origin.

functions.name: SetViewportMouseCaptureMode
functions.description: Sets the current viewport mouse capture mode

functions.name: SetSubtitlesEnabled
functions.description: Will set subtitles to be enabled or disabled.

functions.name: SetSoundMixClassOverride
functions.description: Overrides the sound class adjuster in the given sound mix. If the sound class does not exist in the input sound mix,

functions.name: SetSoundClassDistanceScale
functions.description: Linearly interpolates the attenuation distance scale value from it's current attenuation distance override value

functions.name: SetPlayerPlatformUserId
functions.description: Sets what platform user id a player should be using. This only works for local player controllers.

functions.name: SetPlayerControllerID
functions.description: Sets what physical controller ID a player should be using. This only works for local player controllers.

functions.name: SetMaxAudioChannelsScaled
functions.description: Sets the max number of voices (also known as "channels") dynamically by percentage. E.g. if you want to temporarily

functions.name: SetGlobalTimeDilation
functions.description: Sets the global time dilation.

functions.name: SetGlobalPitchModulation
functions.description: Sets a global pitch modulation scalar that will apply to all non-UI sounds

functions.name: SetGlobalListenerFocusParameters
functions.description: Sets the global listener focus parameters, which will scale focus behavior of sounds based on their focus azimuth

functions.name: SetGamePaused
functions.description: Sets the game's paused state

functions.name: SetForceDisableSplitscreen
functions.description: Enables split screen

functions.name: SetEnableWorldRendering
functions.description: Enabled rendering of the world

functions.name: SetBaseSoundMix
functions.description: Set the sound mix of the audio system for special EQing

functions.name: SetActiveSpatialPluginByName
functions.description: Get list of available Audio Spatialization Plugins

functions.name: SaveGameToSlot
functions.description: Save the contents of the SaveGameObject to a platform-specific save slot/file.

functions.name: RemovePlayer
functions.description: Removes a local player from this game.

functions.name: RebaseZeroOriginOntoLocal
functions.description: Returns local location for origin based position.

functions.name: RebaseLocalOriginOntoZero
functions.description: Returns origin based position for local world location.

functions.name: PushSoundMixModifier
functions.description: Push a sound mix modifier onto the audio system

functions.name: ProjectWorldToScreen
functions.description: Transforms the given 3D world-space point into a its 2D screen space coordinate.

functions.name: PrimeSound
functions.description: Primes the sound, caching the first chunk of streamed audio.

functions.name: PrimeAllSoundsInSoundClass
functions.description: Primes the sound waves in the given USoundClass, caching the first chunk of streamed audio.

functions.name: PopSoundMixModifier
functions.description: Pop a sound mix modifier from the audio system

functions.name: PlayWorldCameraShake
functions.description: Plays an in-world camera shake that affects all nearby local players, with distance-based attenuation. Does not replicate.

functions.name: PlaySoundAtLocation
functions.description: Plays a sound at the given location. This is a fire and forget sound and does not travel with any actor.

functions.name: PlaySound2D
functions.description: Plays a sound directly with no attenuation, perfect for UI sounds.

functions.name: PlayDialogueAtLocation
functions.description: Plays a dialogue at the given location. This is a fire and forget sound and does not travel with any actor.

functions.name: PlayDialogue2D
functions.description: Plays a dialogue directly with no attenuation, perfect for UI.

functions.name: ParseOption
functions.description: Find an option in the options string and return it.

functions.name: OpenLevelBySoftObjectPtr
functions.description: Travel to another level

functions.name: OpenLevel
functions.description: Travel to another level

functions.name: ObjectIsA
functions.description: Returns whether or not the object passed in is of (or inherits from) the class type.

functions.name: MakeHitResult
functions.description: Create a HitResult struct

functions.name: LoadStreamLevelBySoftObjectPtr
functions.description: Stream the level (by Object Reference); Calling again before it finishes has no effect

functions.name: LoadStreamLevel
functions.description: Stream the level (by Name); Calling again before it finishes has no effect

functions.name: LoadGameFromSlot
functions.description: Load the contents from a given slot.

functions.name: IsSplitscreenForceDisabled
functions.description: Returns the split screen state

functions.name: IsGamePaused
functions.description: Returns the game's paused state

functions.name: IsAnyLocalPlayerCameraWithinRange
functions.description: Determines if any local player controller's camera is within range of the specified location.

functions.name: HasOption
functions.description: Returns whether a key exists in an options string.

functions.name: HasLaunchOption
functions.description: Checks the commandline to see if the desired option was specified on the commandline (e.g. -demobuild)

functions.name: GrassOverlappingSphereCount
functions.description: Counts how many grass foliage instances overlap a given sphere.

functions.name: GetWorldOriginLocation
functions.description: Returns world origin current location.

functions.name: GetWorldDeltaSeconds
functions.description: Returns the frame delta time in seconds, adjusted by time dilation.

functions.name: GetViewProjectionMatrix
functions.description: Returns the View Matrix, Projection Matrix and the View x Projection Matrix for a given view

functions.name: GetViewportMouseCaptureMode
functions.description: Returns the current viewport mouse capture mode

functions.name: GetUnpausedTimeSeconds
functions.description: Returns time in seconds since world was brought up for play, adjusted by time dilation and IS NOT stopped when game pauses

functions.name: GetTimeSeconds
functions.description: Returns time in seconds since world was brought up for play, adjusted by time dilation and IS stopped when game pauses

functions.name: GetSurfaceType
functions.description: Returns the EPhysicalSurface type of the given Hit.

functions.name: GetStreamingLevel
functions.description: Returns level streaming object with specified level package name

functions.name: GetRealTimeSeconds
functions.description: Returns time in seconds since world was brought up for play, does NOT stop when game pauses, NOT dilated/clamped

functions.name: GetPlayerStateFromUniqueNetId
functions.description: Returns the player state that matches the passed in online id, or null for an invalid one.

functions.name: GetPlayerState
functions.description: Returns the player state at the given index in the game state's PlayerArray.

functions.name: GetPlayerPawn
functions.description: Returns the pawn for the player controller at the specified player index.

functions.name: GetPlayerControllerID
functions.description: Gets what physical controller ID a player is using. This only works for local player controllers.

functions.name: GetPlayerControllerFromPlatformUser
functions.description: Returns the player controller with the specified physical controller ID. This only works for local players.

functions.name: GetPlayerControllerFromID
functions.description: Returns the player controller with the specified physical controller ID. This only works for local players.

functions.name: GetPlayerController
functions.description: Returns the player controller found while iterating through the local and available remote player controllers.

functions.name: GetPlayerCharacter
functions.description: Returns the pawn for the player controller at the specified player index, will return null if the pawn is not a character.

functions.name: GetPlayerCameraManager
functions.description: Returns the camera manager for the Player Controller at the specified player index.

functions.name: GetPlatformName
functions.description: Returns the string name of the current platform, to perform different behavior based on platform.

functions.name: GetObjectClass
functions.description: Returns the class of a passed in Object, will always be valid if Object is not NULL

functions.name: GetNumPlayerStates
functions.description: Returns the number of active player states, there is one player state for every connected player even if they are a remote client.

functions.name: GetNumPlayerControllers
functions.description: Returns the total number of available player controllers, including remote players when called on a server.

functions.name: GetNumLocalPlayerControllers
functions.description: Returns the number of fully initialized local players, this will be 0 on dedicated servers.

functions.name: GetMaxAudioChannelCount
functions.description: Retrieves the max voice count currently used by the audio engine.

functions.name: GetKeyValue
functions.description: Break up a key=value pair into its key and value.

functions.name: GetIntOption
functions.description: Find an option in the options string and return it as an integer.

functions.name: GetGlobalTimeDilation
functions.description: Gets the current global time dilation.

functions.name: GetGameState
functions.description: Returns the current GameStateBase or Null if it can't be retrieved

functions.name: GetGameMode
functions.description: Returns the current GameModeBase or Null if it can't be retrieved, such as on the client

functions.name: GetGameInstance
functions.description: Returns the game instance object

functions.name: GetEnableWorldRendering
functions.description: Returns the world rendering state

functions.name: GetCurrentReverbEffect
functions.description: Returns the highest priority reverb settings currently active from any source (Audio Volumes or manual settings).

functions.name: GetCurrentLevelName
functions.description: Get the name of the currently-open level.

functions.name: GetClosestListenerLocation
functions.description: Finds and returns the position of the closest listener to the specified location

functions.name: GetAvailableSpatialPluginNames
functions.description: Get list of available Audio Spatialization Plugin names

functions.name: GetAudioTimeSeconds
functions.description: Returns time in seconds since world was brought up for play, IS stopped when game pauses, NOT dilated/clamped.

functions.name: GetAllActorsWithTag
functions.description: Find all Actors in the world with the specified tag.

functions.name: GetAllActorsWithInterface
functions.description: Find all Actors in the world with the specified interface.

functions.name: GetAllActorsOfClassWithTag
functions.description: Find all Actors in the world of the specified class with the specified tag.

functions.name: GetAllActorsOfClass
functions.description: Find all Actors in the world of the specified class.

functions.name: GetActorOfClass
functions.description: Find the first Actor in the world of the specified class.

functions.name: GetActorArrayBounds
functions.description: Bind the bounds of an array of Actors

functions.name: GetActorArrayAverageLocation
functions.description: Find the average location (centroid) of an array of Actors

functions.name: GetActiveSpatialPluginName
functions.description: Get currently active Audio Spatialization Plugin name

functions.name: GetAccurateRealTime
functions.description: Returns time in seconds since the application was started. Unlike the other time functions this is accurate to the exact time this function is called instead of set once per frame.

functions.name: FlushLevelStreaming
functions.description: Flushes level streaming in blocking fashion and returns when all sub-levels are loaded / visible / hidden

functions.name: FinishSpawningActor
functions.description: 'Finish' spawning an actor.  This will run the construction script.

functions.name: FindNearestActor
functions.description: Returns an Actor nearest to Origin from ActorsToCheck array.

functions.name: FindCollisionUV
functions.description: Try and find the UV for a collision impact. Note this ONLY works if 'Support UV From Hit Results' is enabled in Physics Settings.

functions.name: EnableLiveStreaming
functions.description: Toggle live DVR streaming.

functions.name: DoesSaveGameExist
functions.description: See if a save game exists with the specified name.

functions.name: DeprojectScreenToWorld
functions.description: Transforms the given 2D screen space coordinate into a 3D world-space point and direction.

functions.name: DeprojectSceneCaptureToWorld
functions.description: Transforms the given 2D UV coordinate into a 3D world-space point and direction.

functions.name: DeprojectSceneCaptureComponentToWorld
functions.description: Transforms the given 2D UV coordinate into a 3D world-space point and direction.

functions.name: DeleteGameInSlot
functions.description: Delete a save game in a particular slot.

functions.name: DeactivateReverbEffect
functions.description: Deactivates a Reverb Effect that was applied outside of an Audio Volume

functions.name: CreateSound2D
functions.description: This function allows users to create Audio Components in advance of playback with settings specifically for non-spatialized,

functions.name: CreateSaveGameObject
functions.description: Create a new, empty SaveGame object to set data on and then pass to SaveGameToSlot.

functions.name: CreatePlayerFromPlatformUser
functions.description: Create a new local player for this game, for cases like local multiplayer.

functions.name: CreatePlayer
functions.description: Create a new local player for this game, for cases like local multiplayer.

functions.name: ClearSoundMixModifiers
functions.description: Clear all sound mix modifiers from the audio system

functions.name: ClearSoundMixClassOverride
functions.description: Clears any existing override of the Sound Class Adjuster in the given Sound Mix

functions.name: CancelAsyncLoading
functions.description: Cancels all currently queued streaming packages

functions.name: BreakHitResult
functions.description: Extracts data from a HitResult.

functions.name: BlueprintSuggestProjectileVelocity
functions.description: Calculates an launch velocity for a projectile to hit a specified point.

functions.name: Blueprint_PredictProjectilePath_ByTraceChannel
functions.description: Predict the arc of a virtual projectile affected by gravity with collision checks along the arc. Returns a list of positions of the simulated arc and the destination reached by the simulation.

functions.name: Blueprint_PredictProjectilePath_ByObjectType
functions.description: Predict the arc of a virtual projectile affected by gravity with collision checks along the arc. Returns a list of positions of the simulated arc and the destination reached by the simulation.

functions.name: Blueprint_PredictProjectilePath_Advanced
functions.description: Predict the arc of a virtual projectile affected by gravity with collision checks along the arc.

functions.name: BeginSpawningActorFromBlueprint
functions.description: Spawns an instance of a blueprint, but does not automatically run its construction script.

functions.name: BeginDeferredActorSpawnFromClass
functions.description: Spawns an instance of an actor class, but does not automatically run its construction script.

functions.name: AreSubtitlesEnabled
functions.description: Returns whether or not subtitles are currently enabled.

functions.name: AreAnyListenersWithinRange
functions.description: Determines if any audio listeners are within range of the specified location

functions.name: ApplyRadialDamageWithFalloff
functions.description: Hurt locally authoritative actors within the radius. Will only hit components that block the Visibility channel.

functions.name: ApplyRadialDamage
functions.description: Hurt locally authoritative actors within the radius. Will only hit components that block the Visibility channel.

functions.name: ApplyPointDamage
functions.description: Hurts the specified actor with the specified impact.

functions.name: ApplyDamage
functions.description: Hurts the specified actor with generic damage.

functions.name: AnnounceAccessibleString
functions.description: If accessibility is enabled, have the platform announce a string to the player.

functions.name: ActivateReverbEffect
functions.description: Activates a Reverb Effect without the need for an Audio Volume
